news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd temporarily shuts HCD plant due to geopolitical issues in Middle East.
Shutdown declared force majeure; impact unquantifiable currently, steps underway to resume operations.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd temporarily shuts HCD plant due to geopolitical issues in Middle East.
Shutdown declared force majeure; impact unquantifiable currently, steps underway to resume operations.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts' PO plant in Manali temporarily closed due to MOPNG order halting propylene supply.
Supply disruption is linked to Middle Eastern issues; impact on operations remains unclear.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts' PO plant in Manali temporarily closed due to MOPNG order halting propylene supply.
Supply disruption is linked to Middle Eastern issues; impact on operations remains unclear.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts halted Propylene Oxide plant due to propylene supply stop.
Ministry prioritized LPG production, shutdown termed force majeure event.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts halted Propylene Oxide plant due to propylene supply stop.
Ministry prioritized LPG production, shutdown termed force majeure event.

news.title: Tamilnadu Petroproducts completes lab plant expansion, starts operations.
news.summary: Tamilnadu Petroproducts completes lab plant expansion, starts operations.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts' LAB plant cost escalated to ₹365 Cr from ₹310 Cr.
HCD plant cost increased to ₹237 Cr; new downstream units planned at ₹90 Cr.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts' LAB plant cost escalated to ₹365 Cr from ₹310 Cr.
HCD plant cost increased to ₹237 Cr; new downstream units planned at ₹90 Cr.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts restarted HCD plant on March 6, 2026, after earlier halt.
Disclosure sent to stock exchanges as per norms, marking operational resumption.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts restarted HCD plant on March 6, 2026, after earlier halt.
Disclosure sent to stock exchanges as per norms, marking operational resumption.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts to invest ₹7.33 crore in NTPPL for captive power supply.
The company aims to acquire up to 26% stake in NTPPL by Sept 2026.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts to invest ₹7.33 crore in NTPPL for captive power supply.
The company aims to acquire up to 26% stake in NTPPL by Sept 2026.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd will invest ₹7.3 crore in Navia Three Power Pvt Ltd to procure 19.8 MWp solar power.
The investment ensures compliance with Captive User norms under Electricity Act 2003, targeting power cost optimization.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd will invest ₹7.3 crore in Navia Three Power Pvt Ltd to procure 19.8 MWp solar power.
The investment ensures compliance with Captive User norms under Electricity Act 2003, targeting power cost optimization.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts approved unaudited Q3 and 9M results; Q3 revenue 42,092L, net profit 1,764L.
9M revenue stood at 1,33,984L with net profit of 8,293L; cyclone restoration costs included.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts approved unaudited Q3 and 9M results; Q3 revenue 42,092L, net profit 1,764L.
9M revenue stood at 1,33,984L with net profit of 8,293L; cyclone restoration costs included.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd's board meeting is scheduled for 4th February 2026 to review Q3 FY25 results.
The trading window remains closed until 48 hours post-results announcement as per insider trading policies.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd's board meeting is scheduled for 4th February 2026 to review Q3 FY25 results.
The trading window remains closed until 48 hours post-results announcement as per insider trading policies.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts appoints Ms. Sandhya Venugopal Sharma as Additional Director and Chairperson effective January 14, 2026.
Ms. Sharma, a 1995 IAS officer, has held leadership roles in TIDCO, State, and Central Governments.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts appoints Ms. Sandhya Venugopal Sharma as Additional Director and Chairperson effective January 14, 2026.
Ms. Sharma, a 1995 IAS officer, has held leadership roles in TIDCO, State, and Central Governments.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts plans to expand its Heavy Chemicals Division from 150 TPD to 250 TPD.
HCD plant will shut down for 6-7 weeks from Dec 23, 2025, for capacity augmentation.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts plans to expand its Heavy Chemicals Division from 150 TPD to 250 TPD.
HCD plant will shut down for 6-7 weeks from Dec 23, 2025, for capacity augmentation.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts received approval to operate its expanded Linear Alkyl Benzene plant.
Approval from Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board is valid till March 31, 2030.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts received approval to operate its expanded Linear Alkyl Benzene plant.
Approval from Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board is valid till March 31, 2030.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd updates on LAB plant expansion from 120 KTPA to 145 KTPA.
The LAB plant will undergo an 8-9 week shutdown starting 11th Dec 2025 for completion.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd updates on LAB plant expansion from 120 KTPA to 145 KTPA.
The LAB plant will undergo an 8-9 week shutdown starting 11th Dec 2025 for completion.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd reported unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025, with total income of ₹46,826 lakh and ₹47,082 lakh respectively.
Net profit for Q2 FY2025 stood at ₹3,207 lakh standalone and ₹3,424 lakh consolidated, with earnings per share of ₹3.56 and ₹3.81 respectively.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd reported unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q2 and H1 FY2025, with total income of ₹46,826 lakh and ₹47,082 lakh respectively.
Net profit for Q2 FY2025 stood at ₹3,207 lakh standalone and ₹3,424 lakh consolidated, with earnings per share of ₹3.56 and ₹3.81 respectively.

news.title:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd to hold a board meeting on 11th Nov 2025 to review Q2 results.
Trading window will remain closed until 48 hours post financial results announcement.
news.summary:
Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd to hold a board meeting on 11th Nov 2025 to review Q2 results.
Trading window will remain closed until 48 hours post financial results announcement.
